playbook.intent: From first outbound touch on Upwork/LinkedIn to a counter-signed SOW with deposit landing in escrow; pipeline of 3-5 qualified leads in parallel, one close per cycle.
playbook.scope: From first outbound touch on Upwork/LinkedIn to a counter-signed SOW with deposit landing in escrow; pipeline of 3-5 qualified leads in parallel, one close per cycle.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Niche + positioning
stage.intent: Position as a specialist, not a generalist.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when profile copy passes 3 outside readers.

stage.name: Lead sourcing
stage.intent: Build a fresh pipeline of 20 qualified prospects.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when pipeline has >=20 qualified leads.

tasks.task: Write a personalised opener per lead
Reference a specific pain or signal
Run elicitation interviews to surface scope + budget

stage.name: Proposal + SOW
stage.intent: Send a proposal that closes itself.

tasks.task: Draft a proposal from the template

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when proposal is sent within 48h of discovery.

stage.name: Negotiate + close

tasks.task: Run negotiation calls with prepared anchors

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when client agrees to deposit in escrow.

stage.name: Sign + escrow
stage.intent: Hand-off to delivery starts only on signed + paid.

tasks.task: Kick off the project kickoff playbook

extra.value: {human: faion get-content cold-lead-to-signed-contract-3-week-acquisition-flow --format md, agent: faion get-content cold-lead-to-signed-contract-3-week-acquisition-flow --format context, json: faion get-content cold-lead-to-signed-contract-3-week-acquisition-flow --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
